title.rendered: Mastering AI Workflows and Agentic Marketing

content.rendered: In this episode of Marketing In The Now, host David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed Marketing, interviews Frank Days, a fractional CMO and expert in AI workflows. Frank discusses his transition from manual prompting to building sophisticated agentic workflows using the open-source tool N8N. He shares how non-technical marketers can use “vibe coding” to automate repetitive tasks—such as content strategy building, deep research, and brand reviews—without a computer science background. The conversation explores the shifting bottlenecks in marketing, the potential for 100x productivity gains, and the provocative possibility that custom AI agents may eventually replace traditional, bloated SaaS products.
